Game.Name: TwinBee - Rainbow Bell Adventure (Japan)
Game.plot: Pop'n TwinBee: Rainbow Bell Adventures is an Action game, developed and published by Konami,which was released in Japan in 1994.Cheat: Cheat CodesPause the game, press A 5 times, B 5 times, X 5 times, Y 5 times, L 5 times, R 5 times and unpause. Now, hold Start to pause the game and while holding, press the directional keys to move anywhere on the stage map. If you wish, press R to remove the map from the screen.Cheat: Game Endings (Japanese Version)After the credits, depending on how many Fairies, Doors and Goals you collected you'll get a percentage score. The percentage score dictates what rank you get and depending on the rank, you'll get one of the following endings:Cheat: Easy bells on most stagesOn most stages, mainly the early stages, do the following: When you begin, simply fly to 9999 km high, staying on the left boundry of the level, right where you began. When you get to the top, there is a stream of regenerating bells of most colors!
